item.title: Live in America in 2026 (part 6)
item.description:
Artist: Boredwalk https://www.instagram.com/boredwalk.los.angeles/
To quote trump's secretary of commerce, Howard Lutnick: “This is the new model where you work in these kind of plants for the rest of your life and your kids work here and your grandkids work here.” interview with CNBC April 2025

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description: Texture of an apple, flavor of a squash. I don't know how to spell it, but it's called a "chee-oh-tee." Use gloves if you're going to peel it, its juices will make your hands peel. No I'm not kidding.

item.title: Slightly Lewd Meme Mini-Dump
item.description:
Here's a small collection of slighty lewd memes. Some are probably from the Imgur collective, but I have other sources.
(Read right to left)
WTF Disney
Sounds fair to me.
No need to confirm or deny, lol. I had a few other pictures I wanted to include, but couldn't find them, maybe next time?

item.title: How to Stop a Bad Guy with a Gun
item.dc:creator: slimvictor

item.title: The decline and fall of Imgur
item.description:
We've all noticed that posts on the front page are getting fewer and fewer upvotes. Well, here are some numbers showing just how bad it is. This is a sample of over 7800 posts from the Imgur frontpage over the past six years. I've clipped the graph at 5000 upvotes, so there are about 150 posts not visible here, but they were practically all before mid 2021.
Here's the number of views each post got. This is a logarithmic view, so even a slight dip or lift represents a huge decrease or increase in activity. Check out the uplift when the pandemic hit! You can see that everything was ticking along nicely until mid-2023, and then something horrible started to happen. What the heck happened around April or May 2023? Any theories?
For you beautiful fellow nerds who're skeptical of the data or would like to reproduce it: good for you. Critique welcome. Here's how I gathered it: I set the frontpage to Most Viral / Random, opened my browser devtools, reloaded the page, held down PgDn for a minute or two. Saved the history as a HAR file, digested it into CSV with a quick Python script https://pastebin.com/mtxcBSfv, dumped that into Google Sheets to make the graphs.
Cat tax: someone had left a cardboard box outside the door of my local small supermarket, with obvious consequences.
item.dc:creator: TheDildoOfConsequences

item.title: Mermay day 28, mulberry! [OC]
item.description:
The mulberry mermaid! I love mulberries so much, I’ve only ever had them once, fresh off a tree while I was on a holiday in Italy- Been chasing that high ever since!
We have completed four whole weeks of mermay! But we’re not done yet, this month has 31 days, so we’ve got three more to go ;D Let’s have our usual weekly recap:
Week one!
Week two!
Week three and…
Week four!!! Now that’s a lot of fish isn’t it? If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: Ol' Musky will be blaming a cockatoo for rocket failure next...
item.description: "An unlikely suspect has emerged during the investigation into the technical issue that caused the first Australian-made rocket launch to be delayed." The news story link; https://www.news.com.au/technology/science/space/unlikely-suspect-caught-redhanded-over-failed-rocket-launch-in-bowen-qld/news-story/e489f5e9443d7209906d81e86a4498b0

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: 领导
item.dc:creator: Multipass

item.title: RIP to my friend.
item.description:
About 20 years ago I was being a nerd and I sent a fanmail to this man. Peter Kwong. I just told him how cool I thought he was in Big Trouble in Little China, and then I signed out and went to bed. A few days later I checked my email and I had a reply, thanking me for the letter. I replied back saying it was cool to get a reply even though it was probably some person at a desk tasked with replying to fan mail. Then I got another, saying that no, this was Peter lol I was floored. This man was so kind, and we continued to email back and forth, with him being genuinely interested in the goings on of other people trying to put good into the world. We became friends, and talked often on the phone, just chit chatting about our day. I learned of his love for making balloon animals, and teaching Tai Chi. He called me once when he was carrying in groceries, excited he had found the fruits he really liked. Told me all about a family of opossums living just outside of his back yard. He called me when he lost a family member and we talked for a long time about loss and life. He even spoke to my then boyfriend and told him that if he treated me wrong he was going to fly out here and set him straight lol We lost touch about 5 years ago, but only a few months ago I reached out again and we got to speak. I regret not reaching out more, and to find out about his death has just really got me tonight.
Peter, we never got to meet in person, but i really do consider you a friend, and you will be missed. Your views on life were amazing, and how you treated people with such kindness will always mean a lot to me, and everyone that had the joy of knowing you. Rest in peace, my good friend.
item.dc:creator: thecitrinewitch

item.title: I'm a hungry girl ok?
item.description: It was very delicious, it was very artistic, the wine was great, the service was perfect, overall a lovely experience that I am truly grateful for. I think the bill was 300 including the tip. But I was still kinda hungry.... Luckily my friend felt the same way ? So we had some amazing 4€ fries with mayonnaise afterwards.
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.description: This was challenging with my right foot. I couldn't quite lift it high enough on the first step. Just have to keep working on it. I hope had a wonderful day.

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.37 RARE LOOT
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Stefan Große Halbuer
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Harps of Cypress - Thriftworks YouTube: https://youtu.be/eZyBKw734j4?si=eakscGg20lW-KLvb Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/2zqG76TyI5RJva7dDM0Edi?si=e2608f73d8f54fea

Terry Fan
Pascal Blanché
sarahjarrettart
DreamStudio
Zhiyong Jing
Kou
Alan M. Clark
TERU
Rostislaw Tsarenko
Ivan Shavrin
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Anti-AI Reaction Image
item.description: I wanted this for my own use, but figured I’d make it available for everyone No amount of whining or excuses will change my mind. If you use GenAI, you’re trash and you should feel bad. I’m not going to engage with you morons beyond a downvote.

item.title: The bottom shelf memes are blooming beautifully this time of year.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@someuserguy
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Follow the channel to be notified when me and Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) go live, and you can contribute to her Temptations addiction.
I found my husband, our son, and myself 3 different 100 page sketchbooks, and we have now completed 2 out of 100 days of doodles with the family. I call this one "They'll never suspect a thing"
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
